user_prompt: Draft a follow-up message for a ticket that was marked resolved 5 days ago, just confirming everything is still working.
actual_output:
Hi [Customer Name],

I hope you’re doing well. I’m just following up on your recent support ticket to make sure everything is still working as expected.

If the issue has come back or you need any more help, just reply to this message and we’ll be happy to take another look.

Thanks,  
Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly followed the user's request to draft a follow-up message for a resolved ticket, adhering to its persona and guidelines.
